name: Batesville Community Center
description: Batesville Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Batesville, AR. There are 13 wood and concrete courts. 9 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are not available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include lights, restrooms, and water.
fees: Fee required — Membership or daily fee. Free on outdoor court.

name: Newark Ar City Park
description: Newark Ar City Park is a place to play pickleball in Newark, AR. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and water. Reservations are not available.
